name: Article Audio Summary
description: Fetch any article URL, summarize it, and convert to a spoken audio file

config.userPrompt:
Summarize the article below into a clear, spoken audio script.
Requirements:
- 4 to 6 paragraphs, each 2-3 sentences.
- Open by stating the article topic in one sentence.
- Cover the key points, findings, or arguments.
- Keep the tone clear and conversational — written to be heard, not read.
- End with a one-sentence takeaway.
- Return plain text only — no markdown, bullets, headings, or asterisks.

ARTICLE:
{{INPUT}}
